prompt:
A single compact compute node assembled on a bench: a small board with a stacked HAT-style expansion, a slim SSD attached, and a low-profile cooling solution with visible heatsink fins. Clean power and data cables route neatly away; no branding or readable markings.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a clean near-future maker lab aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, minimal clutter, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Frame the assembled node prominently so the HAT stack and SSD are clearly visible at icon scale.
